titlestmt.titleproper: New York State College of Agriculture Department of Floriculture and Ornamental Horticulture records21-25-1911
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-05-03 23:07:38 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Agriculture Department of Floriculture and Ornamental Horticulture records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Department of Floriculture and Ornamental Horticulture

did.physdesc: Organizational records, correspondence, photographs, and printed material.
did.abstract: Includes correspondence, papers, journals, photographs, and other records of the Department of Floriculture and Ornamental Horticulture, New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences, at Cornell University.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The New York State College of Agriculture Floriculture and Ornamental Horticulture formed in 1922 when Landscape Art and Drawing combined with Floriculture.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, papers, journals, photographs, and other records of the Department of Floriculture and Ornamental Horticulture, New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences, at Cornell University. Includes slides of various campus scenes, including Minns Garden.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Agriculture Department of Floriculture and Ornamental Horticulture Records, #21-25-1911. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Horticulture.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences -- : Students.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

did.unittitle: Reports of summer work experience (required for graduation) submitted to Prof. S. Reuben Shapley

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Vol. 3 (2) AMSP: "Physiology of the Flowering of the Gladiolus" (Ph.D., 1933) "A Study of Variation, Correlation, and Classification with Reference to Floricultural Crops" (M.S., 1928), "Gladiolus Studies" (1925, 2 Vols.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Winter hardiness, fertilizing woody plants, container culture drought/irrigation of trees, 2, 4-D and other herbicides, defoliation of nursery stock.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pruning, fertilizer proportioners, container culture, misc. shade tree information

scopecontent.p: A prediction, minutes of extension meeting

American Association of Nurserymen exhibit - New York City
New York State Flower Growers Inc. grants
New York State Seed Association grant

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: NSF grant - Lee & Moore; Gesneriaceae Studies, Naugatuck Chemical Weed Control Grant

New York & New Jersey Carnation Growers grant

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: NYS Flower Growers Orchid Research Fund; NYS Nurserymen's Research Grant; Niagarathal Grant; North American Commercial Gladiolus Grant.

did.unittitle: Public Health Service and National Science Foundation grants - J. P. Nitsch
C. W. Stuart and Company grant
Thompson Hayward Chemical Grant Company grant
U. S. Golf Association - Green Section
American Association of Nurserymen Research Survey grant
Carbide and Carbon Chemicals Company Nursery Weed Control grant
Food Machinery and Chemical Corporation grant
Floriculture and Ornamental Horticulture in New York State
Series II. Photographs, slides, negatives, movie film
Slides, negatives, Kodak carousels, movie film
Photographs of flower settings and shows, campus scenes and greenhouses including Bool's,
Horticulture Winter Courses, some include chair of the department, E.H. White
Oversized photographs of students and faculty in Horticulture Winter Course
Two photographs of McGraw mansion fire
Slides of Minn's Gardens, A.D. White House Gardens, Cornell Golf Course, Campus and Ithaca scenes
Glass slides of plants and graphs used in presentations from the Department of Pomology and Floriculture and Ornamental Horticulture
Glass slides of campus and travels
Slide box 1: Lower Enfield, flowers at Risley Hll, Beebe Lake, building fire, plays and Olin Hall corner stone laying
Slide box 2: Commencement, winter scenes, ice skating, women's archery, Fall Creek, Ezra Cornell statue, Enfield Bath House, Sage Chapel
Slide box 3: Campus flower gardens, A.D. White House, Magnolia Kobus, commencement, alumni singing at reunion
Slide box 4: Sunsets, statue unveiling in front of Bailey Hall gardens, banquet at Willard Straight, flower gardens, drill on alumni fields, senior singing, Cayuga Lake, Sage Hall
Slide box 6: Library Tower, general campus, buildings, Poughkeepsie, Murphy at races, portraits
Slide box 7: Plants, golfing, England trip parade, trip to lake, Girl Scouts, 1939 New York World's Fair
